name: The Good Samaritan
oracleText: Whenever another creature you control is dealt damage, you may gain 2 life. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Good Samaritan" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: Clear, narrative parable treatment with strong card-frame readability.
